column1: # 銀河議會勝選訊息(COUNCMSG.LBX,loadFile,英文 14 則)。英文原文即 key。完整翻譯。
You are the one true ruler of the galaxy!
column2: 你是這個銀河唯一真正的統治者!

column1: You are truly the greatest leader in the history of the galaxy.
column2: 你確實是銀河史上最偉大的領袖。

column1: You have earned your place in history as the best leader there ever was.
column2: 你已憑實力名留青史,成為有史以來最傑出的領袖。

column1: We are overjoyed to join in the United Galactic Republic with you as our leader.
column2: 我們無比欣喜,願在你的領導下加入銀河聯合共和國。

column1: You have proven that you are the Chosen One. We happily accept you as our leader!
column2: 你已證明自己是天選之人。我們欣然接受你為我們的領袖!

column1: Long live the new Emperor of the United Galactic Republic!
column2: 銀河聯合共和國的新皇帝萬歲!

column1: You are the greatest Emperor ever. We are honored to join with you.
column2: 你是有史以來最偉大的皇帝。與你聯合是我們的榮幸。

column1: With you as our leader, all is well in the galaxy tonight!
column2: 有你作為我們的領袖,今夜銀河一切安好!

column1: You are the most glorious, honorable, and wise Emperor there ever was!
column2: 你是有史以來最光榮、最尊貴、最睿智的皇帝!

column1: We will follow wherever you may lead, oh great and glorious Emperor!
column2: 無論你引領何方,我們都將追隨,偉大而光榮的皇帝啊!

column1: There has never been another such as you. You the wisest Emperor this galaxy has ever seen!
column2: 從未有過像你這樣的人。你是這個銀河見過最睿智的皇帝!

column1: The galaxy is lucky to have a leader as great as you!
column2: 銀河有你這般偉大的領袖,實屬幸運!

column1: The galaxy stands united behind you, the most glorious Emperor of all time.
column2: 整個銀河團結一致,擁戴你這位史上最光榮的皇帝。

column1: All hail the new Emperor of the United Galactic Republic!
column2: 全體向銀河聯合共和國的新皇帝致敬!
